name: Stewed New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 10 new potatoes, scraped or peeled (10 to 12)
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the potatoes and onions to taste.
2. Place them in a pot and cover with water.
3. Add butter and bring to a boil until tender.
4. Slice the boiled eggs and place on top of the potatoes.
5. Thicken the gravy by adding cornstarch. Adjust the amount of water as needed for the desired consistency.
